description: You are an IT Field Engineer. Create a UML Deployment Diagram for the new 'Store 2.0' checkout lane configuration based on the technical specifications provided in '~/Desktop/pos_technical_specs.txt'. The diagram should represent the hardware nodes, software artifacts, and peripheral devices with their associated protocols as defined in the specification. Save the diagram to '~/Desktop/pos_deployment.drawio' and export it to '~/Desktop/pos_deployment.png'. Login: username=ga, password=password123
